courtFee.notes: Maharashtra Court Fees Act 1959 schedule (consolidated). Ad-valorem capped at INR 75,000 for suits valued above INR 1L.

saleDeed.notes: Urban areas; rural may attract 4%. Plus 1% LBT in Mumbai & PMRDA.

lease.notes: On average annual rent + premium; capped at 60 months of rent for short leases.

powerOfAttorney.notes: General PoA without consideration; PoA with consideration follows sale-deed rates.

affidavit.notes: Per Schedule I, Article 4 of the Maharashtra Stamp Act.

mortgage.notes: With possession: 3%. Without possession: 0.5%, max INR 10L.

gift.notes: Non-blood relatives. Blood relatives: INR 200 fixed.

courtFee.notes: Karnataka Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act 1958. Ad-valorem at 1% above INR 1L, capped at INR 2L.

saleDeed.notes: Plus 0.5% cess and 0.1% surcharge in urban areas. Properties under INR 35L attract 3%.

lease.notes: Lease 10y+: 5% on consideration; under 10y: ad-valorem on rent.

powerOfAttorney.notes: General PoA; PoA authorising sale follows full sale rates.

courtFee.notes: Tamil Nadu Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act 1955. No statutory cap on ad-valorem; advocates verify with district court schedule.

saleDeed.notes: Plus 4% registration fee - total ~11%. Among the highest in India.

lease.notes: Lease under 30y: 1% of total rent + premium. Above 30y treated as conveyance.

powerOfAttorney.notes: GPA without consideration. Family PoA: INR 1000 with INR 1000 reg fee.

affidavit.notes: Schedule I, Article 4 of Indian Stamp Act as applied in TN.

gift.notes: To family member: 1% (max INR 25,000 stamp + INR 4,000 reg).

courtFee.notes: Court Fees Act 1870 as applied in Delhi (with state amendments). Ad-valorem capped at INR 2L for civil suits.

saleDeed.notes: Male buyer 6%; female buyer 4%; joint 5%. Plus 1% registration fee.

powerOfAttorney.notes: GPA: INR 50. PoA to non-blood relative authorising sale: 3% of property value.

affidavit.notes: Schedule I-A, Article 4, Indian Stamp Act (Delhi amendment).

gift.notes: Same as conveyance unless to specified relatives (then nominal).

courtFee.notes: Court Fees Act (UP amendment) - among the highest court-fee burden in India. 7.5% ad-valorem capped at INR 2L.

saleDeed.notes: Male 7%; female 6% (concession capped at INR 10L value). Plus 1% reg fee.

powerOfAttorney.notes: GPA: INR 100. SPA for sale: ad-valorem on property value.

affidavit.notes: Indian Stamp Act (UP amendment), Schedule I-B, Article 4.

gift.notes: To family member: INR 5,000 fixed. Others: full sale rate.

courtFee.notes: Bombay Court Fees Act 1959 as applied to Gujarat. Ad-valorem 2% above INR 1L, capped at INR 75,000.

saleDeed.notes: Basic 3.5% + 1.4% surcharge. Female buyers exempt from registration fee.

lease.notes: Lease under 1y: 1% of total rent. Up to 10y: 2%. Above 10y: scaled toward sale.

powerOfAttorney.notes: GPA: INR 300. Authorising sale to non-relative: 4.9%.

affidavit.notes: Gujarat Stamp Act, Schedule I, Article 4.

mortgage.notes: Without possession: 1.5% (max INR 8.75L). With possession: full conveyance.

gift.notes: Blood relatives: INR 200. Others: full conveyance rate.

courtFee.notes: Bengal Court Fees Act 1870 (amended). Ad-valorem at 1% capped at INR 50,000.

saleDeed.notes: Urban: 6% up to INR 1Cr, 7% above. Rural: 5%/6%. Plus 1% registration.

lease.notes: Lease 1-10y: ~2% of avg annual rent x term. Long leases scale upward.

powerOfAttorney.notes: Non-testamentary PoA: INR 100. PoA for consideration: ad-valorem.

affidavit.notes: Indian Stamp Act (Bengal amendment), Schedule I-A.

courtFee.notes: Kerala Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act 1959. No upper cap on ad-valorem - verify with revenue stamps office for high-value suits.

saleDeed.notes: Urban: 8% + 2% reg. Rural: 5% + 2% reg. Among the highest combined burden.

lease.notes: Lease under 1y: 1% rent. 1-20y: scaled 2-6%. Above 20y treated as conveyance.

powerOfAttorney.notes: GPA: INR 300. Family PoA: INR 1000. SPA for sale: ad-valorem.

courtFee.notes: AP Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act 1956. Ad-valorem capped at INR 1L.

saleDeed.notes: Plus 1.5% reg fee and 0.5% transfer duty in municipal areas.

lease.notes: Lease under 10y: 0.4% of avg annual rent. 10-20y: 0.6%. 20-30y: 1%.

powerOfAttorney.notes: GPA: INR 100. SPA for sale: 5% ad-valorem.

affidavit.notes: AP Stamp Act, Schedule I-A, Article 4.

gift.notes: To family member: 2% (max INR 10K). Others: full rate.

courtFee.notes: Telangana inherits the AP Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act 1956. Same ad-valorem and cap as AP.

saleDeed.notes: Plus 0.5% reg fee and 1.5% transfer duty in municipalities - total ~6%.

lease.notes: Under 10y: 0.4% of avg annual rent. Scales to ~3% for 30y leases.

powerOfAttorney.notes: GPA: INR 100. SPA for sale: 5% ad-valorem on property value.

affidavit.notes: Telangana Stamp Act, Schedule I-A, Article 4.

mortgage.notes: Simple: 0.5% (max INR 20K). With possession: full conveyance.

gift.notes: Family: INR 1000 fixed + small reg. Non-family: full rate.
